_comment: Labeled gold set for verify_citations.py --selftest. Each tuple is a synthetic bib entry exercising one verdict path of the verifier, resolved hermetically against recorded_responses.json (no network). Real DOIs are reused from references.bib; fabricated/unreachable DOIs are recorded as not-found / error fixtures. Mirrors the reference repo's evals/gold/citation_extraction design, specialized to economics.

schema.title: title as it would appear in the bib entry
schema.author: author field in bibtex form
schema.year: year as recorded in the bib entry
schema.note: bib note field (used for no-DOI exemptions)
